assumptions: padding 8.0 g and 1.0 cm per unit/side

copy.title: SuperSonicBrick Insulated Water Bottle 500ml And Silicone Travel Cup 350ml Bundle Matte Black Forest Green
bullets: Bundle Includes Two Everyday Drinkware Essentials: One 500ml Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle And One 350ml Food-Grade Silicone Travel Cup For Home, Office, Travel, And Outdoor Use.
500ml Insulated Water Bottle Helps Maintain Drink Temperature While The Stainless Steel Body Provides Durable, Reusable Performance For Daily Hydration.
350ml Silicone Travel Cup Offers A Lightweight, Flexible Design With Food-Grade Silicone For Easy Packing, Carrying, And Reusable Beverage Service On The Go.
Compact Bundle Is Easy To Pack In Bags, Backpacks, And Lunch Kits, Making It Convenient For Commuting, Road Trips, Gym Sessions, And Weekend Outings.
Two-Item Set In Coordinated Matte Black And Forest Green Finishes Provides A Practical Drinkware Pair For Multiple Uses And Shared Beverage Needs.
copy.description: This SuperSonicBrick bundle combines a 500ml insulated stainless steel water bottle in Matte Black with a 350ml food-grade silicone travel cup in Forest Green. Designed for everyday hydration and portable beverage use, the set brings together durable reusable drinkware in two compact, travel-friendly formats for home, office, commuting, and outdoor activities.
copy.search_terms: insulated water bottle silicone travel cup reusable drinkware stainless steel bottle food grade silicone cup travel mug hydration set portable bottle bundle

a_plus_modules.headline: Ready for Commute, Gym, or Desk
a_plus_modules.body: Carry hot or cold drinks in the 500ml stainless steel insulated bottle and the 350ml food-grade silicone travel cup. Matte Black and Forest Green finishes suit everyday use, travel, and on-the-go sipping.
a_plus_modules.alt_text: Insulated water bottle and silicone travel cup for travel and daily use
